content.text: Monks of the Way of the Lantern guide lost souls and illuminate hidden truths.

content.name: Lantern Arts
content.text: You learn to create spectral lanterns that shed magical light.

content.name: Guiding Flame
content.text: Allies within 10 feet gain advantage on saving throws against fear.

content.name: Moonlit Path
content.text: You can teleport between areas of bright light.

content.name: Eternal Beacon
content.text: Your lantern becomes a powerful celestial manifestation.
